query:
SELECT id, name, suppliers 
FROM customers 
WHERE suppliers IS NOT NULL 
  AND suppliers != '' 
  AND suppliers NOT LIKE '[%'
  AND suppliers NOT LIKE '{%'
LIMIT 20;
